comments.text:
@pixzdroid  mere cradit card se 2 year ke helth insurance policy ke liye icici Lombard walon ne sirf phone karke hi 3 December ko 19383 rupees kat liye  
Fir maine turant 18002666 per call ki to unhone details le liye aur bola ki aapka policy aur  refund 14 December ko vapas ho jayega .
To kya ye policy cancel ho jayegi aur refund ho jayega ya kuchh aur karna padhega
